message:
feat(core): add FrankenRedis-backed session store with TTL management

Introduces session_store.rs wrapping the fr-store crate to provide
structured session state persistence via FrankenRedis:

- SessionStoreConfig with configurable per-key-type TTLs for pane
  state, window layout, session metadata, and transient coordination
- Namespaced key construction (v1:pane:{id}:state, v1:window:{id}:layout,
  v1:session:{id}:meta, v1:transient:{scope}:{id}) with version prefix
  for future schema migration
- Read/write operations delegating to fr-store with automatic TTL
  attachment based on key type
- SessionStoreError wrapping StoreError for clean error propagation
- All operations feature-gated behind the redis-session feature

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
